name: Stuffed Mexican Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups White Bread, torn into crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine ground beef, tomato sauce, taco seasoning mix, green pepper, onion, bread crumbs, and beaten egg. Mix thoroughly.
3. In another bowl, mix shredded cheese and sour cream.
4. Place half of the meat mixture in a greased 9 1/4 x 5 1/4 x 2 3/4 inch loaf pan. Make a well in the center of the meatloaf.
5. Pour the cheese mixture into the well.
6. Place the remaining meat mixture on top of the cheese.
7. Cover and bake for 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours, or until internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
8. Let cool slightly before slicing.
9. Garnish each slice with avocado slices and a cherry tomato in the center.
Garnishes:
- Avocado slices
- Cherry tomatoes
